top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(badge_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT u.Id, COUNT(b.Id) AS badge_count
    FROM users u
    INNER JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
    WHERE u.Views > 200
    GROUP BY u.Id
) AS user_badge_counts;

SELECT AVG(badge_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT u.Id, COUNT(b.Id) AS badge_count
    FROM users u
    LEFT JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
    WHERE u.Views > 200
    GROUP BY u.Id
) AS user_badges;

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(badge_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT u.Id, COUNT(b.Id) AS badge_count
    FROM users u
    INNER JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
    WHERE u.Views > 200
    GROUP BY u.Id
) AS user_badge_counts;
